hero.title: Websites that
hero.subtitle: I create premium digital experiences for businesses that want to stand out online and turn visitors into customers.

about.title: By 2026,
about.titleAccent: you only exist if you can be found
about.description: Your website is your most-viewed business card. I design digital experiences that communicate value, build trust, and turn visitors into clients.
about.description2: I work with businesses and professionals who want an online presence that matches the quality of their work — not off-the-shelf solutions, but tailored digital identities.

services.title: How they'll
services.subtitle: Four areas of intervention, calibrated on the real context of each business. From brand design to technical infrastructure, every service is built on the concrete needs of your sector.

items.title: Design
items.description: Interfaces designed around your brand positioning, not generic trends. Typography, visual hierarchy and details built to communicate value at first glance.

items.title: Development
items.description: Sites built with modern frameworks and hand-written code. Real performance, simple maintenance, reliable infrastructure that won't leave you stuck six months down the line.

items.title: SEO & Performance
items.description: Technical optimisation for search engines and real users. Semantic structure, Core Web Vitals in the green, content calibrated to your sector's actual searches.

items.title: Google & Local
items.description: Optimised Google Business Profile, visibility on Maps and local search. For professionals and SMEs operating on the ground: being found exactly where and when the client is looking.

portfolio.title: Inspired
portfolio.subtitle: Some of the projects crafted with passion, care, and a focus on results.

process.title: My
process.subtitle: A structured and transparent approach for results that exceed expectations.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I understand your business, goals, and target audience. We start with a free 30-minute call.

steps.title: Strategy & Design
steps.description: I create a unique visual strategy and develop the site design with your approval at every step.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: I bring the design to life with clean, fast, and optimized code. I keep you updated on progress.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.description: We publish the site and I provide ongoing support to make sure everything works perfectly.

contact.title: Book a free
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind? A free 30-minute call could change your online business forever.

footer.tagline: I build websites that grow businesses.
